name: restful-booker-postman-newman
description: API testing suite for Restful Booker using Postman + Newman, runnable from CLI and GitHub Actions.

scripts.test:ci: newman run collections/RestfulBooker.postman_collection.json -e environments/restfulbooker.postman_environment.json -d data/bookings.json -r cli,htmlextra,junit --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report.html --reporter-junit-export reports/junit.xml --timeout-request 60000

author: Samanta Rubio
